---
title: "Photos"
subtitle: "Thank you all for being in my life ：）"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

::: {.photo-grid}

<a href="img/01.jpg" data-caption="Chengdu, Cat, and Yiping"><img src="img/01.jpg" alt="Chengdu, Cat, and Yiping" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/02.jpg" data-caption="Sichuan, horse, and Xiangwei"><img src="img/02.jpg" alt="Sichuan, horse, and Xiangwei" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/03.jpg" data-caption="Lavender"><img src="img/03.jpg" alt="Lavender" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/04.jpg" data-caption="གསེར་རྟ་"><img src="img/04.jpg" alt="Sertar" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/05.jpg" data-caption="NENU"><img src="img/05.jpg" alt="NENU" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/06.jpg" data-caption="Yading Nature Reserve"><img src="img/06.jpg" alt="Yading Nature Reserve" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/07.jpg" data-caption="Aurora, MN — Hong, Yu, Mohan, Jess"><img src="img/07.jpg" alt="Aurora in Minnesota with friends" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/08.jpg" data-caption="Joshua Tree National Park — Ji-An, Mengping"><img src="img/08.jpg" alt="Joshua Tree National Park" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/09.jpg" data-caption="Yosemite National Park — Shaonan, Mengping"><img src="img/09.jpg" alt="Yosemite National Park" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/10.jpg" data-caption="UMN running club"><img src="img/10.jpg" alt="UMN running club" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/11.jpg" data-caption="Yosemite National Park — Shaonan, Mengping"><img src="img/11.jpg" alt="Yosemite National Park" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/12.jpg" data-caption="Birthday cake — Mohan"><img src="img/12.jpg" alt="Birthday cake with Mohan" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/13.jpg" data-caption="Spring 2026, MN — Mohan"><img src="img/13.jpg" alt="Spring 2026 in Minnesota with Mohan" loading="lazy"></a>

<a href="img/14.jpg" data-caption="Moody Gardens — Mohan"><img src="img/14.jpg" alt="Moody Gardens with Mohan" loading="lazy"></a>

:::

<div class="lightbox-overlay" id="lightbox" role="dialog" aria-modal="true">
  <img src="" alt="" id="lightbox-img">
  <div class="lb-caption" id="lightbox-caption"></div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
  const grid = document.querySelector('.photo-grid');
  if (!grid) return;
  const overlay = document.getElementById('lightbox');
  const overlayImg = document.getElementById('lightbox-img');
  const overlayCap = document.getElementById('lightbox-caption');

  grid.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const a = e.target.closest('a');
    if (!a) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    overlayImg.src = a.getAttribute('href');
    overlayCap.textContent = a.dataset.caption || '';
    overlay.classList.add('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  });

  const close = () => {
    overlay.classList.remove('active');
    overlayImg.src = '';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  };

  overlay.addEventListener('click', close);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && overlay.classList.contains('active')) close();
  });
})();
</script>
